docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-01-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HISHAN, MUNIEEB RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALEM, ADHAM $3,604.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,669.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HISHAN, MUNIEEB AS TO DEFENDANT SALEM, ADHAM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-01-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-01-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL PLAINTIFF MUNIEEB HISHAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ADHAM SALEM IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-09-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SALEM, ADHAM
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY HISHAN, MUNIEEB AS TO DEFENDANT SALEM, ADHAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SALEM, ADHAM
